data.en: Once a lion caught a mouse.
data.cn: 从前，一只狮子抓住了一只老鼠。
data.hint: Past tense of 'catch' / 'catch'的过去式

data.en: The mouse promised to help him.
data.hint: past tense + to verb / 过去式 + to do

data.en: The lion laughed and let him go.
data.hint: let is the same in past tense / let 的过去式同形

data.en: Later a hunter caught the lion.
data.cn: 后来一个猎人抓住了狮子。
data.hint: Subject + verb + object / 主语+谓语+宾语

data.en: He was in a big net.
data.hint: Past state 'was' / 过去状态 'was'

data.en: The mouse bit through the net.
data.hint: Past tense of 'bite' / 'bite' 的过去式

data.en: He set the lion free.
data.hint: set free / 释放

data.en: Kindness is never wasted.
data.hint: Present tense for general truth / 普遍真理用一般现在时

data.en: They became good friends.
data.hint: Past tense of 'become' / 'become' 的过去式

data.en: Do you like this story?
data.hint: Present simple question / 一般现在时疑问句

data.en: Long ago a farmer lost his horse.
data.cn: 很久以前，一个农夫丢了他的马。
data.hint: Past tense of 'lose' / 'lose' 的过去式

data.en: His neighbours felt sorry for him.
data.cn: 他的邻居们为他感到难过。
data.hint: Past tense of 'feel' / 'feel' 的过去式

data.en: The horse came back with other horses.
data.cn: 那匹马和其他的马一起回来了。
data.hint: Past tense of 'come' / 'come' 的过去式

data.en: People said that was great.
data.hint: Past tense of 'say' / 'say' 的过去式

data.en: The farmer just said maybe.
data.hint: Use the adverb 'just' / 副词 'just'

data.en: His son broke his leg.
data.hint: Past tense of 'break' / 'break' 的过去式

data.en: He tried to ride a horse.
data.hint: tried to do / 试图做

data.en: Bad things can turn out well.
data.hint: Modal 'can' + base verb / 情态动词 + 动词原形

data.en: The son did not join the war.
data.hint: did not + base verb / did not + 动词原形

data.en: Unlucky things may turn out well.
data.cn: 不幸的事情可能会有好的结果。
data.hint: Modal 'may' / 情态动词 'may'

data.en: An emperor wanted to buy new clothes.
data.hint: wanted to do / 想要做

data.en: Two brothers lied to the emperor.
data.hint: Past tense of 'lie' / 'lie' 的过去式

data.en: They pretended to make the clothes.
data.hint: pretend to do / 假装做

data.en: Only clever people can see them.
data.cn: 只有聪明的人才能看到它们。
data.hint: Modal 'can' / 情态动词 'can'

data.en: The emperor could not see anything.
data.hint: could not + base verb / could not + 动词原形

data.en: He said they were beautiful.
data.hint: Past tense matching / 时态一致

data.en: No one wanted to look silly.
data.cn: 没有人想看起来很愚蠢。
data.hint: look + adjective / look + 形容词

data.en: People in the street praised them.
data.hint: Past tense of praise / praise的过去式

data.en: A boy shouted the truth.
data.hint: Past tense of shout / shout的过去式

data.en: They started laughing in the end.
data.hint: start doing / 开始做

data.en: Mother Duck had six little ducklings.
data.hint: Past tense of 'have' / 'have' 的过去式

data.en: Five of them were small and yellow.
data.cn: 其中五只是又小又黄的。
data.hint: Plural 'were' / 复数 'were'

data.en: The last duckling was big and grey.
data.cn: 最后一只小鸭子又大又灰。
data.hint: Singular 'was' / 单数 'was'

data.en: He did not look like them.
data.hint: did not + base verb / did not + 动词原形

data.en: They told him to go away.
data.hint: tell sb to do / 告诉某人做某事

data.en: He decided to search for a new home.
data.hint: decide to do / 决定做

data.en: The other birds thought he was ugly.
data.hint: Past tense of 'think' / 'think' 的过去式

data.en: He met a cat and a hen.
data.cn: 他遇见了一只猫和一只母鸡。
data.hint: Past tense of 'meet' / 'meet' 的过去式

data.en: He saw three beautiful swans.
data.cn: 他看见了三只美丽的天鹅。
data.hint: Past tense of 'see' / 'see' 的过去式

data.en: He was a beautiful white swan too.
data.cn: 他也是一只美丽的白天鹅。
data.hint: Past state 'was' / 过去状态 'was'
accept: Too he was a beautiful white swan.

data.en: A fisherman lived by the sea.
data.hint: Past tense of live / live的过去式

data.en: He caught a little golden fish.
data.hint: Past tense of 'catch' / 'catch' 的过去式

data.en: The fish promised him whatever he wanted.
data.cn: 那条鱼答应给他任何他想要的东西。
data.hint: Past tense matching / 过去式一致

data.en: He put it back into the sea.
data.hint: Past tense of 'put' is 'put' / 'put' 过去式同形

data.en: His wife was very angry.
data.hint: Singular past 'was' / 单数 'was'

data.en: We need a new pot.
data.hint: Present tense for current need / 一般现在时表示现在的需求

data.en: He went back and asked for one.
data.hint: Past tense 'went' / 过去式 'went'

data.en: The fish granted his wish.
data.hint: Past tense of grant / grant的过去式

data.en: I want to be rich too.
data.hint: want to be / 想要成为

data.en: She asked for money and a house.
data.hint: ask for / 要求
